summary: Sprint PR #1303 landed (feat/go-kernel-delegation, closes #955+#957), but has a merge conflict (mergeable_state: dirty) blocking CI. Needs human to rebase before CI can run. PR #969 confirmed merged on 2026-03-26 (closes #964 — full binary path fix). Swarm-wide P0 alerts (#1319, #1289: credit exhaustion + stuck worktrees) noted; not kernel-caused. PR budget: 1 open / 3 max — PASS. No stuck agents in kernel squad.
